author: lOrm
content: Applied local-correctness fix (Category B) in commit ef7fd258. All four panic-class slice sites replaced with str::get(range) returning Option. 7 regression tests cover: leading 4-byte emoji, CJK prose, smart-quotes, emoji inside JSON body, raw-findings branch with emoji, empty input, adversarial unclosed fence. 1245 lib tests pass. cargo build passes. rustfmt clean. Clippy failure on dead-code in memory.rs::execute_raw is pre-existing, unrelated to this fix.
